course_title: HUMAN RIGHTS IN LAW AND SOCIETY
description: Introduction to the theory, the politics and the sociology of human rights. Main themes: international human rights legal regime, questions of why human rights have become "legalized," and what the consequences of this legalization are on the ground.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: LEGAL ST/​SOC  131,POLI SCI/​LEGAL ST  217, or Junior standing

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: LEGAL ST/​SOC  131,POLI SCI/​LEGAL ST  217, or Junior standing
